topic: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses)

drills.title: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Speaking Set 1
Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: I have been eating rice for an hour.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i have been eating rice for an hour

drills.title: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: I had been eating rice for an hour.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: i had been eating rice for an hour

drills.title: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: I will have been eating rice for an hour.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will have been eating rice for an hour

drills.title: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Speaking Set 5
Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: She has been working for two hours.
sentences.hindi: वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही है।
sentences.pronunciation: she has been working for two hours

drills.title: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: She had been working for two hours.
sentences.hindi: वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she had been working for two hours
